reviews.review_description: Me and my friends love all ur secrets parkour its  hard and fun and it deserves more people hardcore mode is very fun too!! who ever made this is great
The Best Game I Was Looking For

Yes I made the game but I myself genuinely enjoy playing it with my friends and others. there’s tons of things to do with over 45 levels at the moment, a trampoline park, a sandbox mode (it’s in beta so it’s buggy), finding free cosmetics, and even falling out of the map into the backrooms that you can explore to find cosmetics! So make sure to download it RIGHT NOW!

reviews.review_title: Just what I was looking for!
reviews.review_description: I've been waiting for a parkor game with this kind of physics! I'm so glad I'm here early, this game has enough potential to get big! After all, these games with this kind of movement seems to be trending right now so this game came out at the perfect time! I love this game so far, the parkor is challenging but not too hard! Again, I love the physics! I love the blob avatars you play as, they are so cute! Anyways, I can't wait to see this game get big!

I've been playing the game for a while now (before store release), and it's always been fun to me, whether you try to get the fastest time, or, go play around in the trampoline park. This game has lots of potential to be very popular.

Really good game,would recommend to people who want a hard parkour game I still have not made it to the  end and that proves how hard it is,I am a really good parkour player on oculus.over all 5 star game.
I love the game and as a person who has watched your channel for a very long time I love seeing a fan game made by you. Btw I’ve been with your channel since before 10k
